TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Plans that use a co-payment amount rather than a coinsurance percentage will not have a value in this 
field; reference instead the corresponding co-payment variable called (PRE_ICL_LTCP_COPAY_1M). 

The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to
